headline: US-China AI race: one goal, two very different approaches
summary: Investing.com -- Artificial intelligence investment is positioned to remain a central pillar of global economic expansion through 2026, according to a new macro analysis from BofA Global Research. The report, the first in a series titled "AI Matters," suggests that AI-related capital expenditure will contribute approximately 0.4 percentage points to US GDP growth this year.
